purpose: Close the current geometry-only SLAMOnlyRich_current selector path as non-promotable and define the minimum candidate-relative map/pose evidence requirements before any revised SLAMOnlyRich formula.

closure_reason: all candidates are strict map-pose-ready in all 50 source requests, so readiness is saturated
the conservative unique-ready selector is safe mainly because it defers 47 of 50 requests
simple label-free commit-all geometry alternatives recover more successes but reintroduce 21 wrong-goal rows and 4 no-valid commits
map/pose availability does not currently separate correct ObjectNav goal candidates from same-category rivals
formula or weight revision would tune around a separability failure rather than derive a method from a validated failure mechanism

candidate_relative_map_pose_evidence_req.target_question: Can label-free map/pose evidence distinguish a correct goal candidate from same-category rivals before terminal commitment?
candidate_relative_map_pose_evidence_req.allowed_role: nonterminal evidence contract or active observation utility before any terminal policy
required_evidence_properties: candidate-specific: evidence rows must be keyed by candidate id and request group
relative: evidence must compare the candidate against same-category rivals in the same request, not only report absolute readiness

map_pose_native: at least one term must come from map/pose structure such as pose graph consistency, loop or spatial edge support, fragmentation, source coverage, context consistency, or map-pose residual
label_free_action: action-time rows must not contain correctness labels, wrong-goal labels, no-valid labels, oracle fields, shortest-path labels, or evaluation-only variant outcomes
tie_safe: if multiple candidates remain similarly supported, the policy must request more evidence or defer rather than select by semantic rank, detector score, source-top, local-context, or distance
no_valid_guarded: the evidence contract must separate no-valid source-pool risk from same-category rival ambiguity before any commit rule
task_map_linked: later promotion must join at least one map-side metric and one task-side proxy after action rows are frozen

next_research_task.first_question: Which existing label-free map/pose artifacts can produce relative candidate contrast without GT labels or semantic fallback shortcuts?
next_research_task.reason_implementation_blocked: The candidate-relative evidence definition must be frozen before any runtime materializer or formula revision.

interpretation_rule.fact: Current geometry-only map/pose features are saturated across candidates and simple label-free ranking alternatives reintroduce wrong-goal and no-valid commits.
interpretation_rule.agent_inference: The current geometry-only path is not a promotable SLAM/navigation utility. The next method design must create candidate-relative map/pose contrast or keep Semantic-SLAM as a negative result.
